headlines.description: — Coach Frank Reich and the Indianapolis Colts discovered an easy fix to their problems holding fourth-quarter leads: Keep feeding Jonathan Taylor the ball.
headlines.shortLinkText: Taylor runs up the score with 5 TDs; Colts beat Bills 41-15

headlines.description: — Tyler Huntley was on the way to the game Sunday when he got the message from Lamar Jackson.
headlines.shortLinkText: Freeman TD lifts Ravens over Bears with Jackson sidelined

headlines.description: — With the game's outcome in doubt and Cleveland's season in serious danger, the Browns turned to their most reliable player.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chubb runs for 130, Browns hold off winless Lions 13-10

headlines.description: — David Culley relished a big win a couple of hours from his Tennessee hometown with his brother and sister watching.
headlines.shortLinkText: Texans snap 8-game skid, end Titans' 6-game streak 22-13

events.name: Green Bay Packers at Minnesota Vikings

headlines.description: — Much to coach Mike Zimmer's consternation, the Minnesota Vikings have made quite the habit of these white-knuckle, high-stress finishes.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vikings outlast Rodgers, Packers 34-31 on game-ending FG

events.name: Miami Dolphins at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Tua Tagovailoa showed up to his postgame news conference decked out in pajama pants speckled with dogs sporting Christmas hats.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dolphins win third straight, top Jets 24-17

events.name: New Orleans Saints at Philadelphia Eagles

headlines.description: — The Philadelphia Eagles stuck to their run-first approach and dominated the NFL's top-ranked rushing defense.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Hurts runs for 3 scores, Eagles beat Saints 40-29

headlines.description: — Taylor Heinicke was by far the lesser-known of the two quarterbacks making their return to Charlotte on Sunday.
— Making a cross-country trip following a short week that included their most impressive victory of the season, the San Francisco 49ers had the potential for a letdown against Jacksonville.
headlines.shortLinkText: Garoppolo throws 2 more TDs, 49ers dominate Jaguars 30-10

events.name: Cincinnati Bengals at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — Cincinnati Bengals running back Joe Mixon asked his teammates at Thursday’s practice what the plans were for a touchdown celebration in lieu of their first-ever trip to Las Vegas.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bengals snap skid, topple slumping Raiders 32-13

events.name: Dallas Cowboys at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — The Kansas City Chiefs had played so horrendously on defense earlier this season that the Dallas Cowboys and their top-ranked offense probably felt confident that they could keep things rolling Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chiefs lean on D to stuff Prescott, Cowboys in 19-9 win

headlines.description: — When called upon three weeks ago, Colt McCoy viewed himself as a caretaker.
headlines.shortLinkText: McCoy leads Cardinals to decisive 23-13 win over Seahawks

events.name: Pittsburgh Steelers at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — Justin Herbert and the Los Angeles Chargers had the uncanny knack of blowing double-digit leads and losing in the last minute.
headlines.shortLinkText: Herbert throws for 382 yards, Chargers hold off Steelers
